statusLine.command: input=$(cat); current_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); dir_name=$(basename "$current_dir"); git_info=""; if [ -d "$current_dir/.git" ] || git -C "$current_dir" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then cd "$current_dir"; branch=$(git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$branch" ] && commit=$(git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null) && branch="@$commit"; if [ -n "$branch" ]; then dirty=""; git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false diff --quiet 2>/dev/null && git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null || dirty="*"; ahead_behind=""; upstream=$(git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{upstream} 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$upstream" ]; then ahead=$(git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false rev-list --count @{upstream}..HEAD 2>/dev/null); behind=$(git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false rev-list --count HEAD..@{upstream} 2>/dev/null); [ "$behind" -gt 0 ] && [ "$ahead" -gt 0 ] && ahead_behind=":⇣⇡"; [ "$behind" -gt 0 ] && [ "$ahead" -eq 0 ] && ahead_behind=":⇣"; [ "$ahead" -gt 0 ] && [ "$behind" -eq 0 ] && ahead_behind=":⇡"; fi; git_info=$(printf " \033[38;5;242m%s\033[0m" "${branch}${dirty}${ahead_behind}"); fi; fi; venv_info=""; [ -n "$VIRTUAL_ENV" ] && venv_info=$(printf " \033[38;5;242m%s\033[0m" "$(basename "$VIRTUAL_ENV")"); time_info=$(printf "\033[38;5;242m%s\033[0m" "$(date '+%I:%M:%S %p')"); printf "\033[38;2;87;199;255m%s\033[0m%s%s  %s\n" "$dir_name" "$git_info" "$venv_info" "$time_info"
